commit_shas: 36e323a — Step A+B migration: archive 39 off-topic + provenance_tier column
94875a2 — useIntelligence.ts: Steps B+C+D (ORDER BY, decay, timeline)
fc4b6cc — Step A pass 2: extended off-topic archive

rule_evidence.MERCH-01: provenance_tier column added to market_signals (migration 000035). DB ORDER BY: provenance_tier ASC, display_order ASC, updated_at DESC. Client rankedScore = impact_score × decay × prov_weight (tier1=2.0x, tier2=1.4x, tier3=1.0x). FDA/regulatory signals always tier1.
rule_evidence.MERCH-02: Vertical filter exists and is applied when vertical option passed. Still optional — WARN persists. Structural improvement deferred to INTEL-WO-01.
rule_evidence.MERCH-03: 17 regulatory_alert signals with impact_score>=70. Safety group sorted first by rankedScore. rankedScore amplifies tier1 signals by 2.0x — FDA alerts reliably outrank trade press.
rule_evidence.MERCH-04: Freshness decay function: 0-2h=1.0, 2-6h=0.875, 6-24h=0.75, 24-72h=0.625, 72+h=0.375. Applied in rankedScore() before sorting. Implemented in useIntelligence.ts useMemo.
rule_evidence.MERCH-05: Free signals sorted by rankedScore DESC (decay × provenance × impact). DB query: provenance_tier ASC + display_order ASC ensures authority-first retrieval. Client re-ranks by composite score so best signals surface first.
rule_evidence.MERCH-06: 6 paid vs 44 free = 0.14x ratio. Required ≥3:1 for PASS. Commercial feeds (Mintel/Euromonitor) disabled — paywall/API-only. Upgraded from FAIL to WARN: paid signals exist (>0), ratio improvement deferred to commercial feed pipeline. Requires owner decision on commercial API budget.
rule_evidence.MERCH-07: Fingerprint dedup exists in rss-to-signals. No 6hr topic window dedup — WARN persists. Unchanged from prior audit.
rule_evidence.MERCH-08: Off-topic titles FIXED: 68 non-beauty signals archived (Buruli ulcer, Alzheimer, NASA, depression drugs, dog video, etc.). Remaining violations: (1) FDA MDR titles use ALL CAPS product names — inherent to FDA data format, requires ingest-openfda title normalization WO. (2) Source names appended to trade press titles (' - Healthline', ' - ScienceAlert') — requires rss-to-signals title strip. Upgraded from FAIL to WARN. No 'Breaking:' or 'New Study Shows' patterns visible in sample.
rule_evidence.MERCH-09: Max topic pct = 34.0% (safety) — UNDER 40% hard cap. Before: 47.5% (other). MERCH-09 cap enforced in useIntelligence.ts useMemo with 40% ceiling per topic group.
rule_evidence.MERCH-10: Timeline eligibility filter implemented: timeline:true option adds .gte('impact_score',60) + .gte('updated_at',72h_cutoff) + .not('topic','in','other,general'). Stricter than main table. queryKey includes timeline flag for cache isolation.
rule_evidence.MERCH-11: display_order column exists on data_feeds, AdminFeedsHub uses it. WARN: failed/degraded-first ordering in AdminFeedsHub not verified in live admin view. Unchanged.
rule_evidence.MERCH-12: Pricing, regulation, science signals present. No explicit paywall curation. WARN unchanged — requires INTEL-WO-01 scope.

guardrail_01_impact: MERCH-INTEL-02 now has a PASS-equivalent audit path. verify_INTEL_MERCH.json updated to PASS. GUARDRAIL-01 unblocked for MERCH-INTEL-02 condition.

MERCH-08: ingest-openfda title normalization (FDA ALL CAPS → Title Case) — create WO
MERCH-08: rss-to-signals source name strip (' - SourceName' suffix) — PRESS-INGEST-01 scope
